html:
Exclusive to:

ItemBuff StartBuff Ends

“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.

Eating a dish spiced with Honey Crystals doubles their rate of Mining Chopping and Hammering.

Duration 4 minutes.”

-

Honey Crystals are an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Honey at the Portable Grinding Mill.

Honey Crystals can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station. Seasoned Dishes gain the adjective Sweet before their names. When eaten, they double the player's effectiveness in mining, chopping, and hammering. The effect lasts half a day, or 4 minutes.

While eating multiple dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals does not stack the effect, it does reset the cooldown period. Maxwell's Shadow Servants do not benefit from Honey Crystals.

Example

Tips

  • As tools do not consume extra durability during the buff's duration, this effectively increases their durability on top of the benefits of faster gathering speeds.
  • A Mighty Wolfgang with this buff active can easily chop trees and mine boulders in 1-3 hits, making him great at gathering resources.

Gallery

  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals.
  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals in inventory.
  • Dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals appear with a plate on the ground.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Honey Crystals
"A dash of sweetness for peace of mind."
Object Info
Perk
Doubles mining, chopping and hammering effectiveness when combined with a Crock Pot dish.
40
Crafting
×3
Amount produced
2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"spice_sugar"
ItemBuff StartBuff Ends
“Sweet! It's sweet!”
–Wilson
“It's like drinking candy.”
–Willow
“Fruit smashing made sweet sauce.”
–Wolfgang
“Not as sweet as Abigail.”
–Wendy
“WARNING: CONTAINS EXCESSIVE AMOUNTS OF SUCROSE”
–WX-78
“A treacle of fruits.”
–Wickerbottom
“I prefer my syrup to be maple.”
–Woodie
“I never was one for syrupy mush.”
–Maxwell
“The sweet juice öf an enemy.”
–Wigfrid
“It turns everything into dessert!”
–Webber
“The original all natural sweetener.”
–Warly
“Sweet tasty juice!”
–Wormwood
“Now all I need is some pancakes to pour this over.”
–Winona
“A saccharine collection of liquified confection.”
–Wortox
“YUM!!”
–Wurt
“Too much will make you sick.”
–Walter
“Delightfully sweet.”
–Wanda
“Productivity intensifying!”
–Wilson, when the buff starts.
“Where did all this motivation come from?!”
–Willow, when the buff starts.
“You watch, let Wolfgang take care of this!”
–Wolfgang, when the buff starts.
“I suppose I might as well make myself useful.”
–Wendy, when the buff starts.
“EFFECIENCY [sic] OUTPUT AT MAX”
–WX-78, when the buff starts.
“I'll have everything done in a snap!”
–Wickerbottom, when the buff starts.
“Time to roll up our sleeves, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie, when the buff starts.
“My focus feels heightened!”
–Maxwell, when the buff starts.
“Stand aside, I'll have this döne in nö time!”
–Wigfrid, when the buff starts.
“We can help out with the chores!”
–Webber, when the buff starts.
“Now we're cooking!”
–Warly, when the buff starts.
“Faster gooder!”
–Wormwood, when the buff starts.
“Let's turn up the elbow grease!”
–Winona, when the buff starts.
“That was just the thing to give my step a spring!”
–Wortox, when the buff starts.
“Florp...? Why me suddenly wanna do chores?”
–Wurt, when the buff starts.
“Come on Woby, let's get to work!”
–Walter, when the buff starts.
“This is more like it! I'll have everything done in no time at all!”
–Wanda, when the buff starts.
“Desire to procrastinate... creeping back...”
–Wilson, when the buff end.
“Welp. The motivation didn't last.”
–Willow, when the buff end.
“Time for little break.”
–Wolfgang, when the buff end.
“It seems my zeal was short-lived.”
–Wendy, when the buff end.
“DESIRE TO WORK DEPLETED”
–WX-78, when the buff end.
“I can only work tirelessly for so long.”
–Wickerbottom, when the buff end.
“That's enough hustlin' around for now.”
–Woodie, when the buff end.
“My enthusiasm for this has run dry.”
–Maxwell, when the buff end.
“I think I've döne my share.”
–Wigfrid, when the buff end.
“We're bored now.”
–Webber, when the buff end.
“Ah non, I think I'm losing steam.”
–Warly, when the buff end.
“Tired now”
–Wormwood, when the buff end.
“I'm off the clock!”
–Winona, when the buff end.
“All work and no play doesn't suit an imp. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox, when the buff end.
“Tired...”
–Wurt, when the buff end.
“Alright, time for a break.”
–Walter, when the buff end.
“No! I can't slow down now!”
–Wanda, when the buff end.
“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.
Eating a dish spiced with Honey Crystals doubles their rate of Mining Chopping and Hammering.
Duration 4 minutes.”
-

While eating multiple dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals does not stack the effect, it does reset the cooldown period. Maxwell's Shadow Servants do not benefit from Honey Crystals.

As tools do not consume extra durability during the buff's duration, this effectively increases their durability on top of the benefits of faster gathering speeds.
A Mighty Wolfgang with this buff active can easily chop trees and mine boulders in 1-3 hits, making him great at gathering resources.

Dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals appear with a plate on the ground.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Pha lê mật ong là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Chúng chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Warly trong Bộ Lọc Gia Vị bằng cách sử dụng ba Mật Ong tại Máy Xay Di Động.

While eating multiple dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals does not stack the effect, it does reset the cooldown period. [[Maxwell]]'s [[Shadow_Puppet/DST#Shadow Servant|Shadow Servants]] do not benefit from Honey Crystals. =={{Pic32|Icon Science}} Example == {{Recipe |item1=Meatballs |item2=Honey Crystals |tool=Portable Seasoning Station |result=Sweet Meatballs |resultlink = Meatballs/DST }} == {{Pic|32|Prototype}}Tips == * As tools do not consume extra durability during the buff's duration, this effectively increases their durability on top of the benefits of faster gathering speeds. * A Mighty [[Wolfgang]] with this buff active can easily chop [[Tree|trees]] and mine [[Boulder|boulders]] in 1-3 hits, making him great at gathering resources. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Honey Crystals (Overlay) Dropped.png|Overlay for dishes seasoned with Honey Crystals.
